seo_title: CalcFree — practical calculators for tax, money and home projects
meta_description: Free, no-nonsense calculators for UK tax, personal finance, home project costs and more. Clear answers, stated assumptions, sources you can check.
hero_subcopy: Straightforward tools for tax, money and real-world projects — with the assumptions and sources spelled out, so you can trust the number.
value_proposition: Most online calculators hand you a number with no idea what it assumed or whether the figures are current. CalcFree does the opposite: every tool states its assumptions in plain English, links the official source, shows when it was last reviewed, and says clearly where an estimate ends and professional advice should begin.

trust_points.heading: Your numbers stay in your browser
trust_points.text: Calculations run on your device. We don't store the figures you type in.

trust_points.heading: Assumptions you can check
trust_points.text: Every tool states what it assumes and links the official source — HMRC, CRA, ATO and others.

trust_points.heading: Kept current
trust_points.text: Rates and thresholds are reviewed each tax year, with a visible last-updated date.

methodology_section.heading: How our calculators are built
methodology_section.text: Calculation logic is written and tested separately from the rates it uses, so the maths can be checked independently and figures can be updated each tax year without touching the code. We test typical values and the awkward edges, and we state every assumption on the page.

editorial_section.heading: Editorial standards
editorial_section.text: Tools and guidance are written by a named author, reviewed against official sources before publication, and corrected quickly when something's wrong. Advertising keeps the site free but does not influence what our calculators say.
